title: Drain Knowledge
content:
{{Top|canon=Mind probe (Force power)}}
[[File:Jerec-QuRahn_DFJK.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]] rips information on the [[Valley of the Jedi]] from [[Qu Rahn/Legends|Qu Rahn's]] mind.]]
'''Drain Knowledge''', also known as a '''Mind probe''', was a [[Telepathy/Legends|telepathic]] dark side ability used to extract knowledge out of a sentient without his or her consent.

Beyond simple reading of thoughts, the Drain Knowledge ability disrupted [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to steal deep memories and information in a violent and merciless way. Such a process might damage the subject psychologically.

==History==
[[File:The_Questioning_TCG-EM.png|thumb|left|250px|An individual being subjected to Force questioning]]
[[Revan/Legends|Revan]] used this power on [[The One]], in order to learn [[Rakata (language)|Rakatan]] during his initial search for the [[Star Forge]], and forced [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] in his brain, which enabled the Rakatan to communicate with him in Basic.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref> [[Kreia]] used this power on [[Atton Rand]] to learn of his mysterious past in order to blackmail him.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''</ref> Jedi Master [[Atris]] may have threatened to use this power on [[Meetra Surik]] to force her to reveal what caused the destruction of the [[Peragus Mining Facility]] while she was questioning her.

The [[Tenebrae|Sith Emperor]] used this ability against [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] for 300 years after trapping him in stasis, to learn of the Republic's strengths and weaknesses so he could plan a more successful war.<ref name="SWTOR: Revan">''[[The Old Republic: Revan]]''</ref> [[Darth Silthar]] used this on [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]] to learn the location of a spiritual map.<ref name="Journey into Dust">{{TORcite|type=faction|Imperial|Journey into Dust|Tatooine}}</ref>

[[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]], while rendering himself [[Force cloak|invisible]], employed the technique on two [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] investigators to see if they had found a [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] belonging to the late [[Hath Monchar]].<ref name="Shadow Hunter">''[[Darth Maul: Shadow Hunter]]''</ref> While holding [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] prisoner on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], [[Dooku/Legends|Darth Tyranus]] used this power to find any weaknesses in the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master's]] defenses.<ref name="Precipice">
{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/fiction/f20080423/index.html|text=Precipice|int=Precipice|newhost=[[Unbound Worlds|Suvudu]]}}</ref> [[Palpatine/Legends|Darth Sidious]], moments prior to the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], employed this ability on a captured [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], discovering that [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] had died, much to his delight.<ref name="Episode VI novel">[[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi (junior novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'' junior novelization]]</ref> [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] later used it against Luke during their second duel to learn that he had a [[Twin/Legends|twin]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|sister]],<ref name="Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi">{{Film|VI}}</ref> though when he used it on Leia years ago he did not learn that she could use the Force.<ref name="Dark Empire 6">[[Dark Empire 6|''Dark Empire'' 6]]</ref> Luke, despite his claims to [[Gaeriel Captison]], looked into the thoughts of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Pter Thanas]] during the [[Battle of Bakura]], all the way from the ''[[Sibwarra|Shriwirr]]'' to the ''[[Dominant]]''; this may have been a result of the infection brought by [[Olabrian trichoid]]s in his system, pushing him to extremes he would never have taken.<ref name="Truce at Bakura">''[[The Truce at Bakura]]''</ref> [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]] used it against [[Qu Rahn/Legends|Qu Rahn]], learning that the location of the [[Valley of the Jedi]] rested with the late [[Morgan Katarn]].<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II]]''</ref>

[[Kyp Durron]] (while under the influence of [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]]) may have used this ability to rip or otherwise remove scientific knowledge (pertaining to the [[Sun Crusher]]) from the mind of [[Qwi Xux]].<ref name="Star Wars: The Jedi Academy Trilogy">''[[Star Wars: The Jedi Academy Trilogy]]''</ref> [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] used it on former [[Queen Mother]] [[Ta'a Chume]] to find out if she had dealings with the [[Gorog|Dark Nest]] to kill his child, [[Allana Djo Solo|Allana]]. His use resulted in permanent [[Brain/Legends|brain]] damage, leaving Ta'a Chume [[Coma/Legends|comatose]].<ref name="Dark Nest III: The Swarm War">''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''</ref> [[Darth Talon]] used it on the defeated [[Imperial Knight]] [[Elke Vetter]] to gain information on the escaping [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Marasiah Fel]].<ref name="Legacy 2006 2">[[Legacy (2006) 2|''Legacy'' (2006) 2]]</ref>
